title: MLflow metadata is now available in system tables (Public Preview)
body:
MLflow metadata is now available in system tables. View metadata managed within the [MLflow tracking service](/aws/en/mlflow/tracking) from the entire workspace in one central location, taking advantage of all the lakehouse tooling Databricks offers, such as building custom AI/BI dashboards, SQL alerts, and large scale data analytic queries.

For information, see [MLflow system tables reference](/aws/en/admin/system-tables/mlflow).
